news.headline: Australia's Buy Now Pay Later market is booming, expected to hit $14.52 billion by 2025, dominated by Afterpay, Zip, and Humm. Major players seeking partnerships with top retailers like Myer and JB Hi-Fi.
news.summary: A recent report on Australia's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market indicates significant growth opportunities. The market is projected to reach US$14.52 billion by 2025, with an expected annual growth rate of 12.1%. Between 2021 and 2024, the BNPL market in Australia saw strong expansion. The report, offering detailed insights on over 75 key performance indicators including market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business models, and demographics, presents lucrative investment prospects in the BNPL sector.

Illinois American Water invested $277 million in system upgrades in 2024, totaling $2 billion since 2013.
news.summary: Illinois American Water has disclosed that it invested over $277 million by the end of 2024 for system enhancements in various service areas, bringing the total infrastructure investment since 2013 to an estimated $2 billion. These investments were made to improve the aging infrastructure, enhance overall safety, and ensure compliance with regulatory standards.

news.headline: US services sector experienced a sharp drop with PMI falling to 49.7 in Feb 2025 from 52.9 in Jan, first contraction in two years, indicating uncertainty about high prices and Trump admin policies. Services PMI predicted to be 52 points by Q1 end.
news.summary: In February, the S&P Global Flash U.S. Services PMI Business Activity Index dropped to 49.7 from 52.9 in January, significantly below the anticipated 53 points. This decline, the first contraction in over two years, has heightened concerns about the health of the private sector in the United States. The decrease was primarily attributed to worsening new order growth, almost stagnant, as businesses express unease about the Trump administration's spending cuts and potential pro-inflationary policies. Analysts expect the U.S. Services PMI to reach 52 points by the end of the first quarter, as reported by Trading Economics.

news.headline: Atlantic.Net partners with San Jose Earthquakes as Official Cloud Server Hosting Platform in a multi-year deal.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Atlantic.Net has secured a multi-year partnership with the San Jose Earthquakes. This partnership designates Atlantic.Net as the Official Cloud Server Hosting Platform for the team. The agreement is set to span several years and signifies a significant milestone for both entities.

news.headline: Chile's BNPL market set to grow by 33.9% in 2025, reaching $871.7 million, offers investment opportunities till 2030.

Between 2021 and 2024, the BNPL market in Chile demonstrated strong expansion, achieving a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 56. The report provides detailed insights on over 75 key performance indicators, covering aspects such as market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics.

news.headline: Major ByteDance investors boost value to more than $400 bln.
Glaukos Corp reports Q4 sales of $105.5M, up 28% YOY but EPS loss increases. Operating loss decreases to $28.7M.
news.summary: Glaukos Corp (NYSE:GKOS) announced on Thursday that their fourth-quarter sales reached $105.5 million, reflecting a 28% increase from the previous year and surpassing the expected $100.49 million as per consensus. Despite the positive sales growth, the company reported an adjusted EPS loss of 40 cents, an improvement from the 60-cent loss reported previously but falling short of the estimated 38-cent loss. The gross margin for the fourth quarter of 2024 was around 73%, a decrease from the approximately 77% reported in the same period in 2023. Additionally, the non-GAAP gross margin for the fourth quarter of 2024 was about 82%, lower than the 84% reported in the same period in 2023. The company's operating loss for the quarter was noted at $28.7 million, a decrease from the $38.6 million operating loss reported a year ago. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

UScellular Q4 Earnings: 3.99M postpaid connections, 1.29% churn rate, $970M operating revenue, $0.05 EPS beat.
news.summary: United States Cellular Corp (NYSE: USM) disclosed fourth-quarter operating revenue of $970 million, marking a 3% drop from the previous year but surpassing analyst consensus of $965.87 million. The adjusted EPS of $0.05 exceeded the estimated loss of $(0.05) by analysts. Service revenue saw a 2% decrease to $742 million, while equipment sales dropped by 7% to $228 million. According to an analyst, T-Mobile's acquisition of USCellular is crucial for achieving 5G dominance and expanding market presence. The company had a notable number of postpaid connections at the end of the quarter.

news.headline: Consumer sentiment in the U.S. worsened towards end of February.

SEC agreed to end 'bogus' enforcement case against Coinbase, CEO Brian Armstrong announced. Lawsuit withdrawn, no penalties. Case arose in 2023 over allegations of unregistered securities exchange operation. Armstrong defended company's stance.
news.summary: Coinbase Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong recently revealed that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has made the decision to drop its enforcement case against the company. In an interview with CNBC, Armstrong expressed his belief that the lawsuit was unwarranted and lacked a legal basis. He emphasized that this development is significant not only for Coinbase but also for the 50 million Americans involved in cryptocurrency. The SEC had filed a lawsuit against Coinbase in 2023, alleging that the company was operating without proper registration as a securities exchange, broker, and clearing agency. Additionally, the SEC claimed that Coinbase's staking program was in violation of securities laws. Armstrong countered these claims, maintaining that Coinbase had been transparent in its practices. This turn of events marks a positive outcome for Coinbase and the cryptocurrency industry as a whole in the United States.

news.summary: Despite experiencing growing outflows, BlackRock's Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) currently accounts for more than half of the market. Meanwhile, the price of Bitcoin remains strong in the face of industry worries regarding its price movement.

news.headline: Blaqclouds, Inc. launches BitNotify.io, the ultimate crypto alert and notification platform.
news.summary: Blaqclouds, Inc. has unveiled the introduction of BitNotify.io, a cutting-edge platform for receiving alerts and notifications related to cryptocurrencies. This platform aims to provide users with real-time updates on the crypto market, offering crucial information on price fluctuations, news, and trends. With an emphasis on timely notifications, BitNotify.io seeks to empower users with the necessary data to make informed decisions in the volatile world of digital assets. This launch signifies Blaqclouds, Inc.'s commitment to enhancing the crypto experience for individuals, with the platform serving as a comprehensive tool for staying ahead in the fast-paced crypto landscape. Users can customize their alerts based on specific criteria and have access to a wealth of data that can impact their investment strategies. BitNotify.io is set to revolutionize how individuals engage with cryptocurrencies and stay informed in this dynamic market.

news.headline: Report predicts RWA tokenization to boom by 2025, reshaping finance with increased liquidity & innovation in real estate, debt, & equity.
news.summary: Learn about how the process of tokenizing real-world assets is reshaping conventional finance, bringing increased liquidity and completely transforming significant asset categories like real estate, debt, and equity. This innovative approach is making it possible for a wide range of assets to be converted into digital tokens, subsequently enabling their trade on blockchain-based platforms. This advancement has resulted in assets worth billions being tokenized, providing increased access to investment opportunities and enhancing market efficiency.

This award is presented to individuals who have made significant contributions to the television industry for 25 years or more within the Suncoast region, spanning across Florida, Puerto Rico, and parts of Lo.

news.headline: FDA declares Wegovy® and Ozempic® shortage is over, Novo Nordisk meeting or exceeding nationwide demand for all doses, making knockoff drugs illegal.
news.summary: The shipment of all doses of the sole FDA-approved semaglutide medications is ongoing, meeting or surpassing the anticipated U.S. need. The FDA's ruling declares the manufacture or distribution of an imitation compounded medication imitating Ozempic or Wegovy as unlawful, within the scope of compounding.

(NYSE: TBBB) disclosed that underwriters for the planned secondary offering of 21,000,000 Class A common shares have opted to buy an extra 2,338,431 Class A common shares from specific selling shareholders. news.headline: ClearDemand appoints Ryan Licari as CRO to boost retail pricing growth; Licari has 20+ years experience.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, ClearDemand, a leading provider of AI-driven price optimization and competitive intelligence solutions, has appointed Ryan Licari as its Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Licari, who boasts over 20 years of experience in boosting revenue and constructing successful teams, is set to spearhead ClearDemand's growth strategies following its merger with Bungee Tech. This collaboration aims to redefine competitive intelligence and pricing in the market.

news.headline: Article reports ALK-Abelló A/S transactions per market abuse regulation (EU) No 596/2014 by managerial staff.
news.summary: ALK-Abelló A/S, listed under ALK on ALKB:DC, OMX: ALK B, and AKBLF, is required to disclose transactions made by managerial staff as per the Market Abuse Regulation. The company shall report the specified transactions in compliance with article 19 of Regulation (EU) No 596/2014. For further details, refer to the attached announcement.
